target_market_label.en: Canada (ISED radio, ICES, safety, bilingual labelling)
target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（ISED无线电、ICES、电气安全、双语标签）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（ISED無線電、ICES、電氣安全、雙語標籤）

title.en: China-to-Canada Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Canadian market-access requirements, covering ISED radio certification, IC number labelling, ICES interference-causing equipment rules, electrical safety certification, and English/French labelling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与加拿大市场准入要求的差距对照，涵盖ISED无线电认证、IC编号标识、ICES干扰设备规则、电气安全认证及英语/法语标签。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與加拿大市場准入要求的差距對照，涵蓋ISED無線電認證、IC編號標示、ICES干擾設備規則、電氣安全認證及英語/法語標籤。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ISED approval, customs determination, provincial electrical inspection decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Canadian federal and provincial requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ISED批准、海关裁定、省级电气检验决定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或销售前，应与合格专业人士核验现行加拿大联邦及省级要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ISED批准、海關裁定、省級電氣檢驗決定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或銷售前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行加拿大聯邦及省級要求。

answer_first.en: For a China-made wireless or IoT device entering Canada, the hard gaps are ISED certification to applicable RSS standards such as RSS-247, display of the ISED certification number commonly called the IC number, ICES compliance for digital interference-causing equipment, electrical safety certification through a recognized/SCC-accredited certification body for provincial acceptance, and bilingual English/French consumer labelling. Chinese SRRC, CCC, and domestic labels do not substitute for these Canadian obligations.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的无线或物联网设备进入加拿大时，主要硬性差距是按适用RSS标准（如RSS-247）取得ISED认证、标示通常称为IC编号的ISED认证编号、满足数字干扰设备的ICES要求、通过认可或SCC认可认证机构取得电气安全认证以满足省级接受要求，以及提供英语/法语消费者标签。中国SRRC、CCC及国内标签不能替代这些加拿大义务。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的無線或物聯網裝置進入加拿大時，主要硬性差距是按適用RSS標準（如RSS-247）取得ISED認證、標示通常稱為IC編號的ISED認證編號、滿足數位干擾設備的ICES要求、通過認可或SCC認可認證機構取得電氣安全認證以滿足省級接受要求，以及提供英語/法語消費者標籤。中國SRRC、CCC及國內標籤不能取代這些加拿大義務。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
